concerns.detail: Deletion removes substantive observations about specific advisors (UMN Katie Zhao being pushy, students quitting, treated 'like slaves'; and defense of yang老师), which appears to suppress legitimate advising practice information rather than cleanup.
concerns.excerpt:
UMN Katie Zhao
很push 组里有学生quit (应该只有一个PhD转组，因为方向不合适)
她们组的学生和奴隶差不多
和celine一样hhh在yang老师组里做过intern，yang对学生还是很关心的...
